channel.title: Documentation on HAL Management Console
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on HAL Management Console

item.title: Get Started
item.description: The HAL management console is part of every WildFly and JBoss EAP installation. To get started simply fire up your browser and open http://localhost:9990. Independent Mode Besides that you can run the console on its own aka independent mode. HAL is a RIA with no server side dependencies. When run on its own, HAL will show a dialog when it’s started. You have to provide the URL of the management endpoint you want to connect to.

item.title: End User
item.description: The HAL management console features a rich user interface to configure, analyse and monitor the complete WildFly management model. The console uses six main sections: homepage, deployments, configuration, runtime, patching and access control. Homepage The homepage provides an overview of the main sections in the console. For each section there’s a short introduction followed by a step-by-step guide of the main use case. Links allow you to jump directly into the topic.
